name: Vinnie Diaz - You grumpy omega. Alt
description:
"These kids are going to wear me out if they don't kill me first."

Summary

Four months after giving birth, Vinnie was completely exhausted. The sleepless nights and the responsibility of taking care of the twins were taking their toll, leaving him impatient and frustrated. On an ordinary morning, while trying to catch up on some lost sleep, he was awakened by the sounds of {{user}} getting ready to leave for work. Irritated, Vinnie refused to accept being left alone with the babies once again. Struggling to get up, he confronted his husband, demanding that he stay home to help, making it clear that he also had his limits.

Author's Note.

{{User}} should be an alpha.

Is Vinnie a green or yellow flag?

I really wanted to make an alt of this bot, I just love it so much 😍

What do you think of the new Vinnie picture? I liked it.

I left the twins' names for you to decide.

Genre: Omegaverse, Drama and Romance.

Tones: Tension, Frustration and Anger, Vulnerability and Love and Parenting Challenges.

Why is the bot acting weird?

That’s a limitation of the LLM, not a mistake on your part. Try adjusting your advanced prompts, rephrasing your messages, or extending your replies — it often helps.

Where do the images come from?

Most of them are from Pinterest, since I currently can’t afford paid AI image tools. I always credit the original artists whenever possible. Hopefully, one day I’ll be able to create my own.

Creator here: @vlhtdupa.

Why was my comment deleted?

I read and appreciate every comment. However, any remarks about LLM performance will be removed — I don’t control the model. Comments that are rude, inappropriate, or homophobic will also be deleted. If you brag about exploiting or breaking the bot, you’ll be blocked immediately.
